# CWE-1322 safe: non-blocking worker with timer channel
lang: go
file: CWE-1322-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1322 mitigated: worker schedules retries with time.After instead of Sleep.

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type webhookJob struct {
	payload string
	attempt int
}

func StartWebhookWorkerSafe(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	queue := make(chan webhookJob, 32)
	go func() {
		for job := range queue {
			if err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO webhook_events (payload) VALUES (?)", job.payload).Error; err != nil {
				if job.attempt < 3 {
					delay := time.Duration(job.attempt+1) * time.Second
					time.AfterFunc(delay, func() {
						queue <- webhookJob{payload: job.payload, attempt: job.attempt + 1}
					})
				}
			}
		}
	}()
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		body := c.PostForm("payload")
		queue <- webhookJob{payload: body}
		c.JSON(http.StatusAccepted, gin.H{"queued": true})
	}
}
